reviews.comment:
Este lugar se encuentra cerrado en el horario de 00:00 á 06:00. Inclusive sus baños. Una vergüenza. No me explico como un A. C. A., cierre por la noche en una ruta tan transitada.

(Translated by Google)
This place is closed from midnight to 6:00 a.m., including its bathrooms. It's a disgrace. I can't understand how an A.C.A. (airport) closes at night on such a busy route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQway1EQXFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso predio, lastima no se pueden usar los quinchos. Muy abandonados. Igual se puede disfrutar, mucha tranquilidad, aire puro, gran Arboleda. Tiene parcelas para acampar. Me gustó

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful property, it's a shame the barbecue areas are unusable. They're very neglected. Even so, it's very peaceful, with fresh air and a large grove of trees. It has campsites. I liked it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwMmNidUt3EAE
